note: Vectors from 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12). Known constants: 1.5pp first-lien threshold, 3.5pp subordinate-lien threshold. golden_hash empty until golden-parity --update.

vectors.name: first_lien_reportable_at_15pp
vectors.description: APR 7.0%, APOR 5.5%, first lien: spread 1.5pp at 1.5pp threshold -- reportable. Known: 1.5pp first-lien threshold per 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12).

output_payload.apor_source_note: APOR must be sourced from FFIEC weekly table at ffiec.gov/ratespread for the applicable lock date and comparable transaction term.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12); HMDA 12 USC §2801; FFIEC Rate Spread methodology
output_payload.table_source: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12) (2018 HMDA Final Rule FR 2015-26607, effective Jan 2018); FFIEC Rate Spread Calculator (ffiec.gov/ratespread); first-lien threshold 1.5pp; subordinate 3.5pp; HELOC first-lien 6.5pp
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.

vectors.name: first_lien_not_reportable_10pp
vectors.description: APR 6.5%, APOR 5.5%, first lien: spread 1.0pp < 1.5pp -- not reportable, HMDA field code NA.

output_payload.apor_source_note: APOR must be sourced from FFIEC weekly table at ffiec.gov/ratespread for the applicable lock date and comparable transaction term.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12); HMDA 12 USC §2801; FFIEC Rate Spread methodology
output_payload.table_source: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12) (2018 HMDA Final Rule FR 2015-26607, effective Jan 2018); FFIEC Rate Spread Calculator (ffiec.gov/ratespread); first-lien threshold 1.5pp; subordinate 3.5pp; HELOC first-lien 6.5pp
output_payload.pii_note: All inputs are processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.

vectors.name: subordinate_reportable_at_35pp
vectors.description: APR 6.0%, APOR 2.5%, subordinate: spread 3.5pp at 3.5pp threshold -- reportable. Known: 3.5pp subordinate threshold per 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12).

output_payload.apor_source_note: APOR must be sourced from FFIEC weekly table at ffiec.gov/ratespread for the applicable lock date and comparable transaction term.
output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12); HMDA 12 USC §2801; FFIEC Rate Spread methodology
output_payload.table_source: 12 CFR §1003.4(a)(12) (2018 HMDA Final Rule FR 2015-26607, effective Jan 2018); FFIEC Rate Spread Calculator (ffiec.gov/ratespread); first-lien threshold 1.5pp; subordinate 3.5pp; HELOC first-lien 6.5pp
